description: CompositionWhite shirt with short sleeves made of 100% cotton, subtle godet insert on the side hem, full buttoned placket with snap buttons, curved hemline, patch pockets on both chest with snap buttons, embroidery above left pocket, metallic brand badge next to the hem on the left, embroidered brand logo at the back of the neck FittingSlimWash careGentle machine wash inside out with like colours in warm water at 40 C Use mild detergentDo not scrub, bleach, tumble dry or wringDry inside out in shadeWarm iron inside outDo not iron directly on print/embroideryDo not dry clean Classy and awesome are two of the words that you could use to describe this white shirt from s.oliver. You know how they say, when in doubt, wear a white shirt! Team this crisp shirt with blue jeans, and watch the babes drool all over you, as you make an unforgettable style statement.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
